label: Transparent hedgehog motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hedgehog transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a hedgehog motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact European hedgehog in a calm curled-but-readable walking posture, with dense brown and umber spines, cream face and belly, small black eyes, pointed snout, tiny ears, warm brown paws, and a few natural hedgerow leaf accents tucked near the body. Accurate hedgehog anatomy, tactile spine texture, crisp subject edges, cozy personal-system character.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full body visible, no cropping, clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no porcupine, no echidna, no second animal, no landscape, no props except minimal leaf accents, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hedgehog light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Hedgehog", derived from a compact hedgerow hedgehog motif with brown spines, cream face, and leaf accents. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible compact personal system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840x2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hedgehog, Hedgehog, Compact Personal System, Palette, Typography, English UI, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Data/Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from hedgehog spines, warm brown guard hairs, cream face and belly, black nose/eyes, small leaf accents, and hedgerow shelter. The board must read as hedgehog: compact, tactile, protective, personal, warm, organized.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible at gallery preview size.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, spine texture swatches, leaf accent chips, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, cream parchment surfaces, brown spine primary actions, umber active states, moss/leaf green success accents, warm hedgerow ink text, fine spine-stripe texture, compact personal dashboard layouts.
Color palette: brown spine, cream face, leaf green, hedgerow ink, umber shadow, straw highlight, muted bark, soft warm surfaces. Avoid one-note brown by balancing cream, green, and ink neutrals.
Constraints: no porcupine, no echidna, no generic beige-only palette, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Hedgehog", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hedgehog dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Hedgehog". It must feel like the same compact hedgerow personal system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and remain derived from a hedgehog motif with brown spines, cream face, leaf green accents, and warm hedgerow shelter.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840x2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hedgehog, Hedgehog, Dark Mode, Compact Personal System, Palette, Typography, English UI, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Data/Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve hedgehog system language: dense brown spine texture, warm umber shell surfaces, cream face foregrounds, black nose/eye ink, moss and leaf green controls, straw highlights, bark borders, compact personal dashboard layouts, 8px radii, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible at gallery preview size.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, spine texture swatches, leaf accent chips, simple icons.
Visual details: deep hedgerow ink background, umber card surfaces, cream and straw text, brown spine primary actions, moss green focus states, leaf green success, bark borders, soft warm shadows, subtle spine-stripe texture overlays, compact protective panels.
Constraints: no porcupine, no echidna, no neon colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Hedgehog", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
